subcodes.first_line: O dust in the realm of grandeur! Masculinity and femininity pertain to the spirit, not to the body; to the heart, not to clay, for these two qualities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاک در کبریاء رجولیت و انوثیت بجانست نه بجسم بدلست نه بگل زیرا این دو صفت
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @chastity and purity
